The '''Battle of Cyphar''' began when the [[Storm Fleet]] arrived at [[Cyphar/Legends|Cyphar]], attempting to destroy the port.

==The battle==
The [[Navy/Legends|fleet]] had been delayed at the [[Battle of the Llon Nebulae]], giving a [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] fleet enough time to arrive. Nearly half of the Storm Fleet was destroyed, and Cyphar remained in Republic hands.

{{Battle-stub}}
